elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.text: Expanding to the stars avoids risk of a mouse utopian behavioral sink
elonmusk.translate: 拓展到宇宙中避免乌托邦行为的危险

elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.translate: Yup, which is an abbreviation for yes in English. The meaning of "Yup" can vary depending on the context, but it typically means that something has been confirmed or accepted. In a broader sense, it can also be used to express agreement or approval, similar to saying "I'm sure." For example, "Yup, I know this is true," means "I'm certain about it.

jdhasoptions.author: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.name: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.text:
I spent 100 hours over the past week researching, writing and editing the piece we just put out.

It’s a scenario, not a prediction like most of our w...
jdhasoptions.translate: 我过去一周花了100个小时研究、写作和编辑我们刚刚发表的稿件。这是一个情景，而不是大多数我们的工作。但是它被严格构造，如果将其视为预测，需要那种不切实际的智力懒惰。“

xiaomucrypto.author: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.name: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.text:
目前能买到包含海力士和三星股票的etf有
1.a股的中韩半导体etf
2.美股的FLXK
3.港股的俩倍做多海力士/三星.
不推荐的是第三个，前俩个有正股不怕横盘磨损.当然也可以都买，成年人不做选择.

xiaomucrypto.author: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.name: xiaomucrypto
xiaomucrypto.text:
今晚就要发英伟达财报了，我有个猜测，
英伟达营收会符合预期或者超预期，
但是净利润大打折扣不及预期，
因为存储在这个季度的采购成本是之前几个季度的数倍。会挤压英伟达利润。

➤ There Is No Inflation And Growth Is Tremendous

➤ Major Tech Companies Have An Obligation To Provide Their Own Power For AI Data...

2. 大型科技公司有义务为人工智能数据中心提供自己的电力；

QQ_Timmy.text: DRAM，周初DDR5與DDR4供應商未積極報價，而是等待買方出價，但報價態度堅定，價格維持相對穩定，未見恐慌拋售。周四起DDR5品牌顆粒獲買盤支撐，特定料號詢單增加，報價止穩甚至小幅反彈，惟成交仍有限，多處試探階段。DDR3因部分DDR4需求轉向較低價DDR3，詢單略增，報價持續上揚，但雙方價格拉...
